program.title: Bachelor of Science in Agriculture
program.description: This program aims to educate students towards a career in scientifically based sustainable agriculture, to enable them to develop and effectively manage a self-reliant and economically viable agriculture-related enterprise, and to prepare them to become professionals with social commitment. Students may opt for a combination of thesis and practicum or major practice and special problem. The practicum and major practice options are farm/plant practice, research internship, agricultural entrepreneurship, teaching, and extension/community internship. This career can be pursued in any of the following major areas and fields of specialization.
